title: Once Upon a Time in Hollyweird
original_title: Once Upon a Time in Hollyweird
overview: When Hollywood icon Michael Madsen goes missing presumed dead, they call in Rick Blaine (Tom Sizemore) to investigate. A Tarantino-style murder mystery, that is, Once Upon a Time in Hollyweird.
